# Anime Knowledge Sky assets

These assets provide an original, copyright-safe visual foundation for a future interactive homepage scene.

## Composition

- A solitary original explorer viewed from behind
- Character anchored near the lower center
- A calm mountain valley with layered cliffs, mist and waterfalls
- A deliberately large, uncluttered sky for animated overlays
- No text, logos, formulas or recognizable character costume

## Generated files

- `anime-knowledge-desktop.webp` — 2560 × 1440
- `anime-knowledge-tablet.webp` — 2048 × 1536
- `anime-knowledge-mobile.webp` — 1080 × 1920
- `anime-knowledge-placeholder.webp` — 64 × 36 loading placeholder

## Intended animation layer

The open sky is reserved for subtle Canvas, SVG or lightweight WebGL graphics that move through one seamless visual language:

1. molecular and crystalline structures
2. orbital paths and constellations
3. abstract mathematical geometry
4. astrolabe and historical instrument line art
5. flowing paint ribbons and particles

The base image should remain visually dominant. Do not generate readable equations, letters or numbers in the animated overlay.

## Original generation direction

Premium cinematic anime landscape; seated original explorer viewed from behind; vast sunlit mountain valley; large open blue sky; refined feature-film background quality; stable full-screen website composition; no resemblance to an existing anime character; no text, logos or interface elements.
